usage.background: Matte near-black — anchors the entire site, matches the card.
usage.primary: Champagne gold — headings, dividers, CTAs, map marker.
usage.accent: Deep bridal maroon — used sparingly (signature bridal section, subtle highlights).
usage.plum: Echoes the logomark goddess — reserved for a single decorative flourish.
usage.foreground: Cream text on dark — softer than pure white, warmer feel.
